subject: fix(pwa): fix blurry icons, install banner bugs, missing debug pill
body:
Icons were 404ing because manifest referenced /assets/images/ paths but
Expo only serves public/ as static files. Added PWA icons to public/ and
updated generate-icons.mjs to auto-copy them. Added manifest id and
prefer_related_applications: false for reliable Chrome install flow.

Install banner persisted after install because isStandalone was only
checked once on mount. Added display-mode: standalone media query
listener so it updates dynamically. Added resetDismiss + burger menu
"Install app" option so users can re-show the dismissed banner.

Removed __DEV__ guard on DebugPill — alpha-phase diagnostic tool needs
to be visible in all builds.

Tags: pwa, icons, debug, ux, install
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
